title: Show all board items/tasks in one dashboard - table view
excerpt:
I would like to monitor all taks from all my boards in one dashboard - table. But I would like to have daily tracking tamplate, as this one: Daily task manager. 
Is it possible to create such dashboard for all boards and…

posts.author: MarekGaw (Marek Gawdzik)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to monitor all taks from all my boards in one dashboard - table. But I would like to have daily tracking tamplate, as this one: Daily task manager.
Is it possible to create such dashboard for all boards and projects and tasks in one table?

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome @MarekGaw !

if you use the table widget in the Dashboards center you will be able to pull in tasks from different boards and show in one place. The view gets a little expanded, but this is a good started point!

Hope that helps

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
